Description:
Hey there. I run a small security company and we're always in the market for solid operators. Anyway, I've been hearing good things about you and figured we could help each other out. Let me know if you'd like to meet. If so, swing on by [Location] and we can talk.

Miles Eckhart
CEO
ECKHART SECURITY

Miles Eckhart here. I got your name from our HR department. They've been hearing good things about you and recommended I reach out. Now, I like to meet somebody face to face before I get into business with them. Call me old fashioned. So why don't you swing by [Location] and we'll talk. See if we feel like working together.

Miles Eckhart
CEO
